problem id: b4549ab9
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(7) AND NOT SHR(3)) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  10111101 -> 10010111
  01100000 -> 11001111
  00001010 -> 10111011
  10101111 -> 11011101
  00000110 -> 00111100
  00110100 -> 01100111
  01111000 -> 11001111
  10101100 -> 00111101
  10010101 -> 10010111
  00101100 -> 01101101

query: 10011000
predicted answer: 10110011
